scenarios.description: charset(Charset) with updateMetaCharset=false and xml syntax should not add or modify any XmlDeclaration
scenarios.precondition: Document.createShell, outputSettings.syntax set to xml, updateMetaCharsetElement(false)
scenarios.expectedResult: No XmlDeclaration prepended; childNodes unchanged except shell defaults
pseudocode: TEST TC05 charset does nothing when xml syntax and updates disabled

scenarios.description: charset(Charset) with updateMetaCharset=true and xml syntax, existing non-xml XmlDeclaration should be replaced by new xml declaration
scenarios.precondition: Document.createShell, updateMetaCharsetElement(true), outputSettings.syntax xml, prependChild(dummy non-xml XmlDeclaration)
scenarios.expectedResult: First child is new XmlDeclaration named "xml" with encoding and version
pseudocode: TEST TC06 non-xml XmlDeclaration is replaced

scenarios.description: charset(Charset) with updateMetaCharset=true and xml syntax, existing xml XmlDeclaration without version should update encoding only and not add version
scenarios.precondition: Document.createShell, updateMetaCharsetElement(true), outputSettings.syntax xml, prependChild(XmlDeclaration name=xml without version attr)
scenarios.expectedResult: Same XmlDeclaration has updated encoding attr but no version attr is added
pseudocode: TEST TC07 existing xml XmlDeclaration without version gets only encoding updated
